title: Immersive Portal Gun for Forge
description: Port of Immersive Portal Gun for Forge
body: # Portal Gun Mod Reimplementation of [iPortalTeam's Portal Gun Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/portal-gun) for [Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/). ### Requirements - [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) - [Immersive Portals (for Forge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-portals-neoforge) ### Crafting Recipe ### Credits Big thanks to [iPortalTeam](https://github.com/iPortalTeam) for creating the original mod and [Thelnfamous1](https://github.com/Thelnfamous1/PortalGun/) for the 1.19.2 forge port.
